summary: Backend testing completed for Bible multi-language support fix. All 18 tests passed. German language no longer falls back to Italian - returns correct German book names (Psalmen, Matthäus, etc.) and German Bible text (e.g., 'Im Anfang schuf Gott...'). Index-based book resolution working correctly across all 6 languages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bible multi-language fix verified. Key test endpoints: GET /api/bible/books?lang={lang} returns 37 books, GET /api/bible/chapter/{book}/{chapter}?lang={lang} returns verses in correct language. German is confirmed working with German text ('Im Anfang schuf Gott...'), not English fallback.

key_validations: German Genesis 1:1 returns 'Im Anfang schuf Gott...' (German text)
German Psalmen 23:1 returns 'Der HERR ist mein Hirte...' (German text)
Book order consistent across all languages (index 0 = Genesis equivalent)
No language fallback occurring - each language returns its own book names
